name: aems-monorepo
description: Automated Email Management System - AI-powered email organization and data extraction

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm run install:backend && npm run install:frontend
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:backend -- --fix && npm run lint:frontend -- --fix
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check:backend && npm run type-check:frontend
scripts.pkg:build:win: npm run build && pkg dist/apps/backend/main.js --targets node18-win-x64 --output dist/executables/aems-windows-x64.exe
scripts.pkg:build:mac: npm run build && pkg dist/apps/backend/main.js --targets node18-macos-x64,node18-macos-arm64 --output dist/executables/aems-macos
scripts.pkg:build:linux: npm run build && pkg dist/apps/backend/main.js --targets node18-linux-x64,node18-linux-arm64 --output dist/executables/aems-linux
scripts.setup:dev: npm run install:all && npm run build
scripts.release:patch: npm version patch && git push && git push --tags
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor && git push && git push --tags
scripts.release:major: npm version major && git push && git push --tags

author: AEMS Team
